_doc: Authoring meta-pipeline ('yaah authors yaah'): turn a plain-language request into a VALID yaah config pair (root + pipeline). The self-repair mechanic is the engine's OWN retry loop: the draft stage carries a VALIDATOR (role:check-config, a transform that runs yaah.validate.validate_root/validate_pipeline over the draft) with max_attempts+feedback, so a draft that fails the engine validator is retried with the exact validation errors appended to the agent's prompt. Shape: meta-tool (docs/archetypes.md #5) with a branch-with-gate tail.
